data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-assets context — status badge for informational asset-catalog messages (e.g., asset registered, attribute updated). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-assets context — status badge for non-blocking asset concerns (e.g., warranty expiring, missing photo). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-assets context — status badge for blocking asset failures (e.g., file upload rejected, asset record invalid). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-assets context — status badge for asset-integrity-impacting failures (e.g., orphaned attachments, catalog corruption). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-assets context — pilot string for the cluster-B cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting an asset-catalog record (asset, attribute, attachment). Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-assets context — dismiss/abort button on asset forms and attachment dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-assets context — retry button after an upload, indexing, or save failure. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-assets context — empty-state placeholder while fetching the asset catalog. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
